name: Surgical Sutures, Mesh & Hernia Kits
description: Premium grade synthetic absorbable and non-absorbable sutures, high-tensile mesh for hernia repairs, and complete surgical kits for laparoscopic procedures.

name: Ligating Clips, Skin & Endo-Staplers
description: Precision mechanical wound closure solutions including titanium ligating clips and advanced endoscopic stapling systems for minimally invasive surgery.

name: Laparoscopic Devices
description: High-durability handheld instruments, trocars, and insufflation tubes designed for ergonomic comfort and surgical precision in keyhole surgeries.

name: ECG / USG Paper Rolls
description: Standardized thermal recording papers for electrocardiographs and ultrasound machines, ensuring high-contrast, long-lasting clinical diagnostics.

name: Sterile Surgical Gloves
description: Hypoallergenic, powder-free sterile gloves with superior tactile sensitivity and puncture resistance for surgeons and theater staff.

name: Sterile Surgical Gowns & Drapes
description: AAMI Level protective gowns and reinforced surgical drapes, providing an effective fluid and microbial barrier in operating rooms.
